question: How can I add new patients to E-Prescribe?
answer: Create a customer profile for them in vagaro or link and existing profile to them. Ensure they have a first name last name birthday gender address and at least one phone number. Go to customers select a customers and go to the E-Prescribe tab. Select Start prescribing.

question: How do I create a blog post on mysite?
answer: select mysite, go to settings, select blogging, select create new post, in the new post textbox enter teh title of your blog post... additional details on editing... once done select publish post on the top right corner.

question: What business categories must be selected to accept FSA and HSA payments when signing up for credit card processing?
answer: You must select the Med Spa, Medical Services and Health Practitioners, or Chiropractors, Chiropractic Offices business/industry category.

question: What are the four types of components available for building a website in MySite?
answer: The four types of components are: Text Components (headers and text blocks), Layout Components (to organize and separate content), Element Components (simple components like images, videos, and buttons), and Vagaro Components (sync from your Vagaro business).

question: What options do I have to filter a customer's class attendance history on the Vagaro Pro app?
answer: You can filter a customer's class attendance history by selecting the Filters button and then choosing options for Status, Class, All Teachers, and Start Date/End Date.

question: What happens to my custom designs if I reset my MySite?
answer: Vagaro will not refund any custom designs if you decide to reset your MySite.

question: What details can be edited when modifying a class or workshop in Vagaro?
answer: When modifying a class or workshop in Vagaro, you can edit the class name, class description, category, resources, add-ons suggested, applicable taxes, business cost, cleanup time, whether the class is shown online, workshop cost, number of sessions, sell price, live stream price, duration, points given, points to redeem, and optionally add a photo.

question: What steps should I follow to reply to a customer's review on a phone?
answer: To reply to a customer's review on a phone, select More → Reports → Review Management. Filter your report as needed and select Run Report. Below the customer's comment, enter or generate your response in the Write a reply box. You can either write your own response or select Reply with AI to auto-generate a response. After reviewing the generated response, select Use this Text and then select the Post Response button to post your message below the customer's comment.

question: What should you do if an attendee doesn't have a profile at your business while registering them for a class?
answer: You can create a profile for them by selecting the + in the top-right corner.

question: How do I add additional stock to a partial-use product on a phone?
answer: To add additional stock on a phone, select More → Settings → Management, then choose your partial-use product from the inventory. In the top-right corner, select Action → Add. Scan your products or select Add (Containers) Manually. After adding all products, select Next. If the Barcode Already Exists popup appears, select Add Quantity, enter the date received, Business Cost, and Total Quantity, then select Add to add the new stock.

question: What criteria does Vagaro use to automatically delete customer profiles?
answer: Vagaro uses the following criteria to automatically delete customer profiles: customers without an email, customers without a phone number, customers without a card on file, and customers who haven't visited within a selected period. Vagaro only removes a profile that matches every selected criterion.

question: How can I undo a check-in at the kiosk if I accidentally checked in for the wrong appointment?
answer: To undo a check-in at the kiosk, select Check in to sign into your Vagaro account. In your list of appointments, select the More menu beside the appointment or class that was checked in, then select Undo Check-In. If you have multiple check-ins to undo, toggle on their switches to select them, then select Undo Check In. Finally, select Close or Check-In and select Done on the confirmation screen.

question: What happens if I have only one Vagaro license regarding the business hours setup?
answer: If you have only one Vagaro license, which is usually the business owner's, the toggle for specifying business hours does not appear. Instead, the working hours entered in the business owner's Employee Profile screen are automatically used.

question: What steps do I need to follow to add a Vagaro Service to my service menu on a phone?
answer: To add a Vagaro Service to your service menu on a phone, select More → Settings → Service/Class Menu. Then select Services to view your service menu. Verify that the Service/Class Menu is for the correct employee, select Add, and then select Service. Choose Vagaro Service or Custom Service, scroll through the list of services, select the one you want to add, and then select Save.

question: What are the steps to create a compound medication in E-Prescribe?
answer: To create a compound medication in E-Prescribe, go to Customers and select a customer. Then, select the patient's profile and go to the E-Prescribe tab. In Prescriptions, select Prescribe New Drug → Compound/Specialty → Setup Compound. Enter a Title and a Comment for the compound, then select Add Compound. Next, select Edit next to Compound to enter Ingredients, Quantity, Directions, and the Pharmacy for the compound medication, then select Update Compound.

question: How can I jump to a specific month and year on the calendar using a phone?
answer: On a phone, you can jump to a specific month and/or year by selecting the Menu menu in the top-right corner, then selecting the Calendar Jump button. Use the < or > buttons to cycle through the different months, or select the current month with the Down-Arrow icon to choose another year or month. After selecting a day on the calendar, select Done to update your calendar.

question: What information is displayed on the Company Pays tab for each employee?
answer: The Company Pays tab shows the first and last name of each employee, the gross amount of money paid to the employee, the payment method, the amount reimbursed, the total amount of taxes paid by the company for the employee, the total amount of benefits paid by the company for the employee, and the subtotal of all amounts paid by the company for the employee.

question: What steps do I need to follow to decrease the quantity of a single product on my phone?
answer: To decrease the quantity of a selected product on your phone, select More → Settings → Management, then select the product to be edited. If you want to decrease the stock of a single Variant, select the Right-Arrow > next to the product to view its Variants. In the top-right corner of the screen, select the button, then select Subtract. Enter the date, select a reason for the reduction, and optionally enter a comment. Finally, select the Subtract - button to remove stock from your inventory and select Save.

question: How do I access the Checkout Settings on the Vagaro Pro App?
answer: To access the Checkout Settings on the Vagaro Pro App, go to the Checkout screen and in the top-right corner, select the Settings icon.

question: What is Vagaro's public key used for in the context of data transfer?
answer: Vagaro's public key is used for encrypting data during the transfer process using PGP encryption.

question: What information is displayed for each customer profile in the Customer List Report when viewed on a phone?
answer: The following information is shown for each customer profile listed in the report on a phone: Name, Amount Spent, Email, Address, Cell Phone, Day Phone, Night Phone, Customer Since, Last Visited, Membership, Online Booking status, Birthdate, Gender, Referred By, Tags, Appointments Booked, Classes Booked, Check-Ins, Credit Card details, Bank information, Points Earned, and No Shows/Cancellations.

question: What notifications will a customer receive after an invoice is created for them?
answer: The customer will receive the invoice by email and text with instructions on how to pay online, as well as a push notification notifying them of the new invoice.

question: What are the benefits of creating Daily Deals on Vagaro?
answer: Creating Daily Deals helps advertise your business to new customers, encourages returning customers, and increases visibility by appearing on the Vagaro Marketplace, your Vagaro Listing Page, and MySite.

question: How can I change the URL of a new page I add to my MySite?
answer: You can change the URL of a new page by updating the URL Slug in the page settings.

question: How do I use a package to redeem a service during booking on Vagaro?
answer: On the checkout screen, ensure no points or memberships are applied, then select 'Use Package Visit' for the package to be used, and proceed with booking your service or class.

question: Why should I set up safe IP addresses for my team members in Vagaro?
answer: Setting up safe IP addresses allows team members to log in only from specific, approved locations, preventing unknown users and devices from accessing your Vagaro business account.

question: How can I resend an invitation to my customers after changing my Vagaro URL?
answer: After updating your Vagaro URL in your Business Profile, go to Marketing, select Invite Customers, and confirm to resend the invitation, which will send a new welcome email with the updated URL.

question: How do I add a product bundle in Vagaro using a barcode scanner on a computer or tablet?
answer: To add a product bundle with a barcode scanner, plug the scanner into your device, press and hold the power button, and hold it up to the barcode until you hear a beep. The code will appear in the text box. Then, select Next to continue.

question: What should I do if the receipt printer does not print a test receipt during setup?
answer: Ensure that the receipt printer is powered on, all cables are fully inserted, and the receipt paper is inserted correctly, then select Test again or choose Skip for now to try later.

question: How can I display my business phone number when there are no available appointments on my Vagaro Listing Page?
answer: Enable the setting 'Display Business Phone Number When Appointments are Unavailable' to prompt customers to call your business and show your phone number when no appointments are available.

question: How do I change the title tag for a specific page on my Vagaro MySite?
answer: To change a page's title tag, select MySite, go to the Pages tab in the left design panel, hover over the page, click the Gear button, scroll down to Title Tag, enter your new tag, and then select Save.

question: How can I view the current balance of a gift card if the receipt is lost?
answer: You can view the current balance of a gift card by going to the Gift Card Report, which shows all gift cards sold and their balances.

question: What information do I need to enter under the Business Information section when setting up my Vagaro business profile?
answer: You need to enter your business's legal name, a description of what your business does (at least 100 characters), contact information including phone, email, and website, and your Vagaro URL.

question: How do I add a new external link to my Vagaro MySite navigation bar?
answer: To add a new external link, select MySite, go to the Pages tab in the left design panel, click Add Nav Link, enter a Link Name, input the Link URL of the external website, optionally toggle Open in new tab, then click Save.

question: How can I apply a gift card to my purchase on Vagaro's website if it's not automatically applied?
answer: On a computer, go to the Vagaro Listing Page, add items to your cart, proceed to checkout, then under the Gift Cards heading, select the gift cards you'd like to apply. If needed, select Add Gift Card, enter the Gift Card Number, and click Apply.

question: What happens to my data when I deactivate the Data Lake integration?
answer: Deactivating the Data Lake integration will remove all previous, current, and future data from your business intelligence software.

question: What are the recommended dimensions and aspect ratio for uploading a logo image to Vagaro?
answer: The recommended dimensions are at least 1000 x 667 pixels, and the image should be placed on a 3:2 canvas (1280 x 1920 pixels) to ensure proper cropping and professional appearance.

question: What information do I need to enter to add a new employee's profile in Vagaro?
answer: To add a new employee's profile, you need to enter their First Name, Last Name, Email, Confirm Email, and optionally upload a Profile Picture, and provide personal details such as Address, Gender, Birthday, Phone Number, and Company Information like Start Date and Reports To. You also set their Login Information, including Username, Employee Card ID, Password, Security Question, and Employee Access settings.

question: How can I view the usage history of a customer's purchased package in Vagaro?
answer: To view a customer's package usage, go to the customer's profile, select the Packages tab, then select the package and click History.

question: What details are shown in the Payment History section of the Vagaro Capital Report?
answer: The Payment History section displays the days you've made payments, showing the payment date, the amount paid, and your remaining balance for each payment.

question: How can I list my business on Google and Apple Maps using Vagaro?
answer: To list your business on Google and Apple Maps, go to your Business Profile settings, toggle on 'List Business on Vagaro.com,' which also enables listing on Google.com and Apple Maps, provided you have the required business accounts, and then click Save.

question: How do I clear browsing history and cache in Microsoft Edge?
answer: In Microsoft Edge, click the action menu (3 dots), select Settings, then Privacy, search, and services. Under Clear browsing data, click Choose what to clear, select the items you want to clear, choose a time range, and click Clear now. Finally, close all browser windows and restart Edge.

question: How can I add a new brand to my products in Vagaro if it's not already in the preset list?
answer: Go to the Inventory Management screen, create a new product or edit an existing one, select 'Create New Brand' from the Brand list, enter the Brand Name, and then select Save.

question: How can I change the hero image in my new blog post on MySite?
answer: Hover over the image box in your new blog post, then select Change Hero Image. You can choose to search online, upload an image from your computer, or select from your previously uploaded images in the library. You can also modify the image's appearance, layout, position, and roundness using the right settings panel.

question: When is the confirmation request typically sent to a customer before their appointment?
answer: A confirmation request is typically sent 72 hours before the scheduled appointment.

question: Where do I add custom code to include Google Tag Manager on my MySite?
answer: You add custom code in the Head Code box for the header or the Footer Code box for the footer in your MySite settings, then save and publish your site.

question: What happens if I run out of email or text credits when sending a campaign?
answer: If you run out of email or text credits, you'll be charged an overage fee for each additional message you send, and a popup will appear to inform you of the overage and options to upgrade or accept the charges.

question: Who is authorized to activate the Facebook Book Now button on my Vagaro business page?
answer: Only the Vagaro business account owner can activate the Facebook Book Now button; employees will see a popup stating 'You have no rights to authorize' if they try.

question: How can I edit a recurring appointment to change only one occurrence without affecting the series?
answer: When editing a recurring appointment, select 'Edit This Occurrence' to change only that specific appointment without affecting the entire series.

question: What must be done before transferring ownership if the current owner has future bookings?
answer: The future bookings must be moved to another employee's calendar or a new employee who does not have hours or services before ownership can be transferred.

question: How do I create a generic customer profile for walk-in clients in Vagaro?
answer: To create a walk-in profile, select Customers, then on a mobile device tap the Add + button and enter 'Walk' as First Name and 'In' as Last Name, then select Save. On a computer, select Customers, then click Create New and enter 'Walk' for First Name and 'In' for Last Name, then Save.

question: What information is included in the Appointment Timeline for a Vagaro appointment?
answer: The Appointment Timeline includes the appointment date and duration, the service added, the employee who provided the service, any notes added, who booked it and when, whether it was modified and by whom, the appointment status, any changes made, and on a computer, any email or text notifications sent to the customer.

question: How can I upload artwork for a custom gift card if it's not ready during the order process?
answer: You can email the artwork file later to artwork@ecardsystems.com if it isn’t ready at the time of your order.

question: How can I refund a partially redeemed package using the Transaction List report on a phone?
answer: To refund a partially redeemed package on a phone, select More → Reports → Transaction List, set the date range and filters, then swipe left on the package to be refunded, select Refund, enter the refund amount and tip if applicable, then proceed with the refund steps including selecting the refund method and confirming.

question: How do I duplicate a product on a mobile device in Vagaro?
answer: To duplicate a product on a mobile device, select More → Settings → Management, choose the product, then in the top-right corner, select Action → Duplicate. Make any needed changes and then select Save to add it to your inventory.

question: How can I change my legal business name on Vagaro after account creation?
answer: To change your legal business name on Vagaro, contact support with documentation supporting the change.

question: How can I test if my Vagaro receipt printer is working correctly after setup?
answer: To test your printer, go to the Transaction List Report screen, run a report, select a transaction, then select Receipt. In the receipt screen, select the arrow next to Print and choose your printer. If no receipt prints, refer to Troubleshooting Vagaro Receipt Printer.

question: How can I customize which services are displayed in the Services component on my MySite?
answer: In the MySite Editor, select the Services component, then scroll down to the Services option in the Style panel. Search for and select the specific services and categories you want to include on your website.

question: How long does it typically take to import my data from Timely to Vagaro after scheduling an import appointment?
answer: It typically takes one to three business days to import your information from Timely to Vagaro after scheduling your appointment.

question: What happens to the employee's name in the customer's appointment notifications when auto-assign is enabled?
answer: Once an employee is assigned through auto-assign, their name is removed from the customer's booking notifications across all platforms, including push, email, text messages, waitlists, and the Appointment screen.

question: How can I unsubscribe from marketing emails from a specific Vagaro business?
answer: At the bottom of the business's email, select 'Here' to access your notification settings, then choose to unsubscribe from marketing emails or texts from that business.

question: How can I change the default calendar view that appears when I log in to Vagaro?
answer: You can change the Default View at Login setting from either your Calendar or your business settings. This determines whether the calendar opens in Day, Week, Month, or Agenda view when you log in.

question: How can I add customer names automatically to the subject line of my email campaign?
answer: Select Insert Name, then choose First Name or First & Last Name to auto-populate the customer's name in the subject.

question: How do I set up a separate merchant account for retail sales in Vagaro?
answer: Go to Credit Card Processing: Phone: Select More → Settings → Credit Card Processing, then on a Computer, Tablet, Pay Desk, or PayPro: Select Settings → Credit Card Processing, turn on Route Item Sales to a Different Merchant Account, select a merchant account for product purchases, and click Save.

question: How can I require a credit card for customers to book a service online on Vagaro?
answer: Go to Online Shopping Cart → Settings → Online Shopping Cart, then scroll down to 'Require Deposit or Capture Credit Card at the time of Booking Services' and select 'Capture Credit Card.' Provide the minimum service price, cancellation/no-show fee, cutoff time, and select customer types that need to provide a credit card, then click Save.

question: How do I activate a larger Email Marketing Plan on a computer?
answer: To activate a larger Email Marketing Plan on a computer, go to Settings → Settings → Email Marketing Plans and select a plan.

question: What is the main difference between an Email Blast campaign and automatic campaigns in Vagaro?
answer: An Email Blast campaign is a one-time message sent to a specific or filtered group of customers, while automatic campaigns, such as Birthday or Lost Customer campaigns, continuously send emails based on set criteria until deactivated.

question: How can I restore customer profiles deleted on or after a specific date using Vagaro?
answer: To restore customer profiles, select the date from which you want to restore customers and confirm the action. On a phone, go to More → Reports → Customers, then choose Action → Undo Delete, select the date, and proceed. On a computer or tablet, go to Reports → Customers, select Undo Delete, choose the date, and click Proceed, then confirm with OK.

question: How can I add color options as variants to a product on Vagaro?
answer: To add color options as variants, select 'Color Swatch' as the display option, then choose a color for each variant by selecting Plus + or Pencil, depending on the device you're using.

question: How can I view or reprint a customer's receipt from the Transaction List Report?
answer: Select the transaction ID in the Checkout Date/Checkout By/Transaction ID column or scroll to the far right of the report and select Receipt to view, reprint, or send the receipt to the customer via email.

question: How can I confirm a customer's attendance for an upcoming class session using the Vagaro Pro App?
answer: To confirm a customer's attendance using the Vagaro Pro App, select the class session on the calendar, tap the session name in the menu, select the attendee, and then choose 'Confirm' to verify that the customer will attend the session.

question: How can an administrator sign an employee's pending form using the Unsigned Forms report?
answer: An administrator can open the form from the Unsigned Forms report, which shows the employees authorized to sign. If the administrator has permission, they can log in, sign the form, and then select Save.

question: What permissions does an employee need to view and edit their own time card entries?
answer: Employees can view their own time card entries without additional permissions, but to edit or delete their own entries, they need Modify access in Reports → Employees → Time Card.

question: How do I add an employee profile on my phone using Vagaro?
answer: To add an employee profile on your phone, select More → Settings → Employee Profiles, then tap Employees to view all profiles, and choose Add Employee. Enter the employee's First Name, Last Name, Email, and Confirm Email, along with any optional information needed.

question: How does adding emojis or non-Latin characters affect the character limit per message segment?
answer: Adding emojis or non-Latin characters reduces the number of characters allowed per segment, with standard messages allowing 160 characters per segment and messages with emojis or unsupported languages allowing 70 characters per segment.

question: How can I copy a direct link to book a specific service or class on Vagaro using a mobile device?
answer: On a phone, go to More → Settings → Service/Class Menu, select Services or Classes, choose the service or class, then select Share Link. In the Create Link screen, tap Share Link to copy the link or send it directly.

question: How do I add pages to a folder in my MySite drop-down menu?
answer: Hover over a page, select the Move button, and then drag that page under the folder in the Pages tab.

question: What is the typical timeframe for a business to dispute a chargeback after being notified in Vagaro?
answer: Once notified in Vagaro, you have around eight days to dispute the chargeback.

question: How long does it take to receive my cash advance after approval from Vagaro Capital?
answer: It takes two business days to complete the review process and receive your cash advance after approval.

question: How can I manually set my business hours on Vagaro if I am not using employee working hours?
answer: To manually set your business hours, go to your Business Profile settings, scroll down to Business Hours, select the days your business is open, and specify the opening and closing times for each day, then click Save.

question: How can a business add or update an appointment note for an existing appointment in Vagaro?
answer: To add or update an appointment note for an existing appointment, go to the Calendar, select the appointment, then choose Edit (on the app) or Note (on a computer), enter or update the note under Appointment Notes, and then save.

question: How can I add a new item to my store's list if I only want to keep track of its label and price, without selling it online?
answer: You only need to input the product's barcode, name, brand, and price if you're creating it for in-house purposes without online sales or quantity tracking.

question: How can I sell a digital gift card with an auto-generated number using Vagaro on a computer?
answer: To sell a digital gift card with an auto-generated number on a computer, go to the Checkout screen, select a customer, click 'Gift Card,' then choose 'Auto Generate' for the Gift Card Number, enter the amount, select a template type, and proceed with the sale.

question: How do I remove an attendee from a class session using the Vagaro Pro App?
answer: To remove an attendee using the Vagaro Pro App, select the class session on the calendar, open its details, select the session name, then choose the attendee to remove and tap Cancel. Complete any optional steps, then mark the attendee as cancelled and save.

question: What is the fee to restore my files after deactivating Vagaro Drive?
answer: The fee to restore your files is a one-time $50 charge.

question: How do I create a time off request on the Vagaro calendar?
answer: To create a time off request, go to the Calendar screen, select the desired calendar, choose the day and timeslot, select Personal Task, then Event Type: Request Time Off, specify the time off type, start and end dates and times, add comments if needed, and finally select Request.

question: How can I reward my clients for sharing their opinions about my business online?
answer: You can give customers points for leaving a review on your Vagaro Listing Page, which they can later use to purchase services, classes, or products.

question: How can I add a Vagaro Class to my class menu on a mobile device?
answer: To add a Vagaro Class on a mobile device, select More → Settings → Service/Class Menu, then tap Classes to view your menu. At the top, verify the correct employee, use Filters to select another if needed, then tap Add and choose Class. Select Vagaro Class or Custom Class, pick the classes to add, and tap Save.

question: How can I edit a recurring class session on the Vagaro Pro App and what happens if I choose to edit only this occurrence?
answer: To edit a recurring class session on the Vagaro Pro App, select the class on the calendar, then choose 'Edit' and select 'Edit This Occurrence' to modify only that specific session. If you choose to edit only this occurrence, it will unlink from the series, and future changes to the series will not affect this session.

question: What should I do if a customer doesn't arrive for their appointment and I want to make sure they are billed for missing it?
answer: You can mark the attendee as a no-show and enter a fee to charge their credit card, either individually or for multiple attendees, to discourage future absences.

question: How can I prevent customers from booking appointments for family members or friends on my Vagaro listing?
answer: Go to Online Appointment Rules in your settings and turn off 'Allow Family and Friends Booking,' then save the changes.

question: How can I ensure cookies are enabled on my iPhone Safari browser?
answer: Go to your phone Settings, select Safari from the left side menu, then scroll down to Privacy & Security and make sure Block all Cookies is turned off.

question: If I want to keep in touch with my clients even when they're not logged into Vagaro, what should I consider?
answer: You should consider purchasing a text messaging plan, as it allows you to send direct SMS messages to your customers regardless of their activity on Vagaro.

question: If I stop using my calendar app with Vagaro, will my upcoming appointments still show up?
answer: No, if you disconnect your calendar, all Google events will be removed from your calendar unless they were converted to a service or class.

question: How can I check in a customer using the Check-in app without a membership card or QR code?
answer: Select Check in, enter the customer's name, select them, have them enter their password, and then select Check In.

question: How can I set up a repeat session or service with my favorite provider without creating a new appointment each time?
answer: You can rebook a service or class directly from your profile if you enjoyed the previous experience with the same provider.

question: How can I make it easier for clients to see what my place looks like and get a sense of atmosphere?
answer: You can add a venue gallery with up to 100 photos, including images of your interior, exterior, and logo, which will be displayed on your listing and receipts.

question: How do I set the TSP 100 Printer as the default printer in Windows after installation?
answer: Open Control Panel, select View devices and printers, right-click the TSP 100 Printer icon, and choose Set as Default Printer.

question: Where can I change the employee booking order that appears on my Vagaro Listing Page?
answer: You can change the employee booking order by going to Settings → Online Appointment Rules, scrolling down to the Booking section, selecting your preferred Online Employee Booking Order, and then clicking Save.

question: If I want to reward my team based on how much they sell, but only after a certain sales amount, what should I do?
answer: You can set up tiered commissions that apply different percentage rates or fixed amounts depending on sales ranges, so employees earn more as they reach higher sales tiers.

question: How can I register an attendee for multiple class sessions at once using the Vagaro Pro App?
answer: To register an attendee for multiple sessions, select the class, choose Add Attendees, enter the number of sessions and start date, set the frequency (weekly or monthly), and then add the attendee. You can also add add-ons and payment info before completing registration.

question: How can I filter my email campaign list to only include customers within a specific age range?
answer: Use the 'Age Between' slider to select an age range (from 0 to 110) for customers to receive the campaign.

question: If I decide I don't want an upcoming message to go out anymore, how can I stop it from being sent?
answer: You can cancel the scheduled campaign through your device by accessing the marketing options, finding the campaign in the queue, and confirming the cancellation.

question: How do I manually configure my Star wireless printer to connect to my Wi-Fi network using an Android device?
answer: To manually configure your Star wireless printer on Android, ensure the printer is OFF, press the FEED button while turning it ON to print network info, then connect your Android device to the printer's Wi-Fi (not internet). Open a browser and go to 192.168.10.1, log in with username 'root' and password 'public', select WLAN Settings, choose Infrastructure Mode, enter your SSID and Security Key, set Security to WPA2/AES, then go to IP Parameters, select Static, and input your IP Address, Subnet Mask, and Default Gateway. Save and execute the settings; the printer will restart and connect to your network.

question: What steps do I need to take before deleting my Vagaro customer account?
answer: Before deleting your Vagaro account, you must cancel all future appointments or classes, cancel any recurring memberships or packages, and settle all outstanding invoices and IOUs.

question: How can I keep track of any special requests or important details for my upcoming visit?
answer: You can add Appointment Notes to record any special requirements, reminders, requests, or comments related to the appointment.

question: If I need to change the device that handles my card payments, how do I disconnect the current one from my system?
answer: Open the Vagaro Pro app, go to More → Connected Devices, then select Unassign Reader and confirm to disconnect the device.

question: What should I avoid including in my text campaigns to prevent them from being flagged as spam?
answer: You should avoid using all caps, excessive punctuation, phrases like 'BOOK NOW!!!' or 'FRee SeRVice,' spam trigger words such as 'I <3 U' or '100% FREE,' restricted terms related to cannabis like 'Ganja' or 'CBD,' too many emojis, business contact info, and price listings.

question: How can I connect my Vagaro campaign to my Facebook page for posting?
answer: You can connect your Vagaro account with Facebook and post your campaign on your page by toggling the 'Post On Facebook' option during campaign setup, provided you have set up the Facebook integration beforehand.

question: Can I get more funding after I have paid between 50% and 100% of my current Vagaro Capital funding?
answer: Yes, businesses that have paid 50 to 100% of their funding may be eligible for renewal and will receive a notification when they are eligible.

question: What must a renter have before they can be charged rent through the system?
answer: Renters must already have an employee profile before they can be charged rent.

question: How can I switch between different views during a Vagaro live stream session?
answer: During the live stream session, you can switch between the Gallery, Speaker, and Presenter view by selecting the corresponding buttons on the toolbar.

question: How can I assign a gift card to a customer without taking payment in Vagaro?
answer: You can assign a gift card to a customer's profile using the Gift Card report by selecting 'New Gift Card,' entering the details, and choosing to send or print it, without processing a payment.

question: How can I change the name of a document I stored in my online file space without losing any details?
answer: You can rename the file by opening a sidebar where you can enter a new name and add a description.

question: How can I invite my acquaintances to join Vagaro without using keywords from the instructions?
answer: You can share your unique referral link through social media, email, or messaging apps to encourage others to sign up for Vagaro using that link.

question: How do I assemble the Vagaro handheld QR stand after receiving my barcode scanner?
answer: To assemble the stand, rotate the cradle insert upwards, spin the cradle 180 degrees, invert it so it's pointing down, slide the insert over the stand until it clicks, and then adjust the cradle to the desired angle.

question: How can I pay a contractor using Vagaro Payroll and what are the steps to run the payroll report?
answer: To pay a contractor with Vagaro Payroll, go to Reports → Payroll (or More → Reports → Payroll History on phone), select Contractors, then choose Regular Payroll. Configure your report filters, select Run Report, and for each contractor, select Action → Edit Payroll to enter payment details, including pay method, hours, tips, bonuses, and reimbursements. After reviewing the report, click Submit to process the payroll.

question: How can an employee view their rental agreement online?
answer: An employee can view their rental agreement online by selecting the contract's name in the Rent Collection tab, which displays the signing date and allows them to view the agreement.

question: What criteria does Vagaro use to determine the target profile when merging duplicate customer profiles?
answer: Vagaro selects the target profile based on this order: if only one profile has signed in, that one is kept; if both have a card on file but only one has an email, the one with the email is kept; if both have a card and email, the profile with the most appointments and classes is kept.

question: What must be done before a custom service can be found on my Vagaro Listing Page?
answer: Each custom service must first be assigned to a service provider who accepts online bookings for customers to find it on your Vagaro Listing Page.

question: How do I delete a time off request from my Vagaro calendar?
answer: Go to the Calendar screen, select the requested time off, then click Delete. In the popup, select Yes to confirm the deletion.

question: What should I do if I have set up deposits with an unsupported bank on Vagaro?
answer: If you have set up deposits with an unsupported bank, you must change the bank in your Merchant Account to ensure you receive your funds.

question: What should I do if I receive a suspicious email claiming to be from Vagaro?
answer: Do not respond, click links, or download attachments; instead, forward the suspicious email to support@vagaro.com.

question: How can I run an off-cycle payroll for contractors in Vagaro?
answer: To run an off-cycle payroll for contractors in Vagaro, go to Reports → Payroll, select Contractors, choose Off-Cycle Payroll, configure your report filters, select the contractors, add payments, then review and submit the payroll in the popup.

question: How can staff members add a reminder or special instruction to a client's record before their visit?
answer: Staff can add a note to the client's profile, which can be a general comment, allergy info, or a reminder, either through the app or on a computer, and it will be saved in their profile for future reference.

question: How can I filter the Rebooking report to show data for a specific employee and location?
answer: On a computer, tablet, Pay Desk, or PayPro, you can set filters by selecting Filters in the top-right corner, then choosing the specific employee and location options before running the report.

question: How can I tell if my online booking site is connected to my Yelp page so customers can see the 'Book Now' option?
answer: You can check your Business Profile settings to see if the 'List Business on Yelp' feature is enabled, which indicates your Yelp integration is active.

question: What happens if a Daily Deal does not meet Vagaro's quality standards during review?
answer: If a Daily Deal does not fit Vagaro's standards, it will be denied, but it will still be shown on your Vagaro Listing Page and in Email/Text marketing campaigns.

question: If I want to make sure my clients give me their contact details when they fill out a form, how can I set that up?
answer: You can add the Contact module to your form and turn on the 'Required Field' option to ensure clients provide their contact information.

question: How do I download the Vagaro Pro app on my device?
answer: To download the Vagaro Pro app, open your device's app store, search for 'Vagaro Pro,' and then select 'Get' on an Apple device or 'Install' on an Android device. After installation, open the app and log in or create a new account.

question: How can I include images or videos to help customers better understand my products?
answer: You can add an image or video to your product listing under the Upload Image section, and it will be displayed on your product's page to help customers see what you're offering.

question: How can I filter my email campaign recipients to only include customers who have been with my business since before a specific date?
answer: Use the 'Customer Since' filter, select 'Before,' and then choose the specific date to target customers who have been with your business since before that date.

question: Can I set an auto-renew limit for a package or a membership?
answer: Yes, both packages and memberships let you set an auto-renew limit.

question: What should I do if my PayPro Mini isn't pairing with my Mac or PC after connecting via USB-C?
answer: Ensure you have the latest version of the Vagaro Pro Utility (1.1.6 or above for Mac), update the utility if needed, and verify that your device is properly connected via USB-C. Also, check permissions in Chrome or Edge as instructed, and make sure your computer and PayPro Mini are always plugged in via USB-C for a successful connection.

question: How can I check which gadgets have been used to access an employee's account on my phone or computer?
answer: You can view the connected devices by navigating to the employee's profile settings, then accessing the Password & Security section to see the devices listed there.

question: How can I fill out a new form for a customer from their profile on Vagaro's web version?
answer: Go to Customers, select the customer, click on the Forms tab, click 'Fill New Form', choose the form to be filled out, select 'Fill Form' in the popup, complete the form, then click 'Save'.

question: How can I make a form mandatory for customers when they book a specific service or class?
answer: To require a form for specific services or classes, turn on 'Form is Mandatory When Booking' in the form's settings and then select the services and classes you want to require the form for.

question: How can I see which clients had their appointments canceled or marked as no-shows within a specific period?
answer: You can run the Cancellations and No-Shows report by selecting the appropriate date range and filters to view appointments that were denied, canceled, deleted, or considered no-shows during that time.

question: How can I ensure that my message reaches only those clients who have been with my business for a certain period or have made a specific number of visits?
answer: You can use filters like 'Customer Since' to target clients based on when they joined and 'No. of Apps Between' to select customers with a certain number of appointments.

question: How do I set the Star TSP100III USB printer as the default printer on my Mac?
answer: Connect the printer to your Mac with the USB cable, turn it on, then go to System Preferences > Print & Fax, and select STAR TSP 100 from the Default Printer drop-down menu.

question: What are the processing rates for small merchants processing in-person payments via swipe, dip, or tap?
answer: For small merchants processing in-person payments via swipe, dip, or tap, the rate is 2.6% plus $0.10 per transaction, with no monthly fee required.

question: How can I filter the Payroll History report by payroll period on a mobile device?
answer: On a phone, to filter the Payroll History report by payroll period, select Filters in the top-right corner, then choose Run Report, and select the desired Payroll Period date range.

question: What types of sales are included in the Service Sales total in the report?
answer: The Service Sales total includes revenue from in-house or online cart service sales, based on checkout date, excluding points redemptions, business cost, tips, discounts, taxes, refunds, and membership, package, and gift card redemptions.

question: What does the 'Payroll Due' amount represent in the Employee Payroll Tab?
answer: The 'Payroll Due' amount represents the total amount paid to the employee for the pay period.

question: If I want to update the notes on a pending debt record, how would I do that?
answer: You can select the IOU and choose the Edit option to change the comment added to the IOU.

question: If I want a unique symbol to represent my business, how does Vagaro help me get one made?
answer: Vagaro's team of skilled designers can craft a personalized logo for your business, with options for revisions and the ability to order through their online store.

question: How long does it typically take to import my business information from Booksy to Vagaro after scheduling an import appointment?
answer: It typically takes one to three business days to import your information from Booksy to Vagaro after scheduling your appointment.

question: How can I view the history of changes made to a personal task on the Vagaro Pro App?
answer: Select the personal task on the calendar, then tap Action → History in the top-right corner to see all previous changes made to the task.

question: How do I rebook an appointment from the Vagaro Pro App calendar?
answer: To rebook from the Vagaro Pro App calendar, go to the Calendar screen, select the appointment to open its details, then tap Rebook. Confirm the appointment details, select a timeslot from an employee's availability, review the details, and then tap Book to add the appointment to the calendar.

question: How can I update a customer's package to change the number of visits in Vagaro?
answer: To change the visits balance, select the package in the Packages report, then choose 'Edit Balance' to update the number of visits.

question: How do I group multiple same-day appointments for checkout on a mobile device?
answer: On a phone, select Checkout, then Select Customer, choose In Today, select the customers to be grouped, and then select Group Customers. Choose the customer who will pay for everyone, enter payment information, and then select Checkout.

question: How can I reset my Vagaro password if I forgot it?
answer: To reset your Vagaro password, open the Vagaro app or Vagaro Pro app, tap 'Forgot Password,' enter your email address, and then check your email for a message from Vagaro. Follow the link in the email to set a new password and then log in with it.

question: What is the primary purpose of a SOAP Note in Vagaro?
answer: The primary purpose of a SOAP Note in Vagaro is to serve as a professional documentation tool for internal use, recording details of a client session such as progress, treatment details, or session logs.

question: How can I make more employee schedules appear on my screen without losing clarity?
answer: You can switch to the Compact view to display more calendars simultaneously, or choose the Fit All option in the Day view to resize calendars to fit the screen.

question: How can I check if my Vagaro EMV reader is successfully connected on a Windows computer?
answer: Click the Vagaro icon in the system tray; a Blue Dot indicates the reader is connected and ready to process transactions, while a Red Dot means it is not connected.

question: How do I add a custom field to a form or SOAP note in Vagaro?
answer: In the form designer, select the Custom Field element, drop it into the form builder, and then choose the custom field from the Select Field list.

question: When can the cash drawer balance be viewed in Vagaro, and does it include past dates?
answer: The cash drawer balance can be viewed at any time of the day in the Transaction List summary view, but it only shows the current day's balance and does not include past dates.

question: How do I add envelopes or sleeves to my Vagaro gift card order?
answer: Click on the Envelopes & Accessories tile, then select View Stock Envelope Options, choose the quantity for each sleeve option, and click Continue to proceed with your order.

question: How can I make sure customers are notified when their class starts after they've checked in?
answer: You can enable the Confirm Customer Mobile Number During Check-In option to prompt customers to enter their phone number, so they can receive notifications when their class begins.

question: What are the prerequisites for a business to be approved to Get Featured on Vagaro?
answer: The prerequisites include having a business type that offers services in industries like barber, beauty, fitness, wellness, self-care, or pet grooming; a business description in your profile; at least one spoken language and accepted payment method selected; a cancellation policy; and a logo or high-quality photo that meets image standards.

question: What is the cost of activating the Xero integration for a Vagaro business in USD?
answer: The cost is $10 USD per month.

question: How can I get my cash drawer to open automatically when I print a customer's bill?
answer: Connecting the cash drawer to the receipt printer with the RJ12 cable will cause it to open automatically each time a receipt is printed.

question: How can I write a review for a business I visited using the Vagaro app?
answer: Log into your Vagaro account in the Vagaro app, go to the business's Vagaro Listing Page, scroll down to Reviews, select Write a Review, choose a rating, optionally select a service provider or employee, add photos if desired, and then tap Post Review.

question: What role should I assign to Vagaro when inviting them to my Apple Developer account?
answer: You should select the Admin checkbox in the Roles section when completing the New User form.

question: How do I choose where I want the appointment to happen when I book a mobile service?
answer: You can select whether the service takes place at the business, at your profile's address, or another location you specify.

question: How can I manually split a tip among multiple employees during checkout in Vagaro?
answer: During checkout, select 'Split' and have the customer enter the amount to tip each provider, then click 'Apply'. This option only appears if multiple employees are selected at checkout.

question: How can I encourage clients to buy something online before or after their appointment using my messages?
answer: You can include a special discount code in your automatic email and message alerts, which may motivate clients to make a purchase on your Vagaro Listing Page either before or after their scheduled visit.

question: What hardware components are included in the box when I purchase PayPro?
answer: The box includes the main PayPro unit with a tilting screen, the PayPro hub, an AC adapter, and an AC adapter cable.

question: How do I set up automatic cancellation or no-show fees for services in Vagaro?
answer: To set up automatic cancellation or no-show fees for services, go to Online Shopping Cart > Settings > Online Shopping Cart, select 'Capture Credit Card' under 'Require Deposit or Capture Credit Card at the time of Booking Services,' and enter the minimum service price, fee amount (percentage or fixed), and cut-off time. Then, choose the customer types required to provide a credit card and save the settings.

question: How can business owners restrict employees from changing prices or applying discounts during checkout in Vagaro?
answer: Business owners can restrict employees by setting Access Levels under Settings > Discounts Checkout > Customer Checkout, choosing options like View or Modify for discounts, and setting specific permissions for Price Reductions and Discounts for each area, which may require approval for changes.

question: How can I access my business's payroll documents in Vagaro Payroll on a computer?
answer: On a computer, go to Settings → Vagaro Payroll, then select the Documents tab, find the document you want to view, and click Download.

question: What steps should I follow to cancel my Vagaro subscription on a computer or tablet?
answer: To cancel your Vagaro subscription on a computer or tablet, go to Settings → Manage Subscription, scroll down to Cancel Subscription, then select Cancel My Vagaro Subscription. Provide the reasons for cancellation, share any feedback, read and agree to the cancellation policy, then select Cancel Vagaro Account and confirm by selecting Cancel Subscription.

question: Where do I set up my employees' salaries in Vagaro?
answer: You set up your employees' salaries in the Payroll Configuration screen by selecting Reports → Payroll Configuration, then scrolling down to the Salary tab and entering their Salary Per Year for each employee.

question: What steps are involved in creating a ScriptSure account for e-Prescribe setup?
answer: To create a ScriptSure account, you need to enter your personal NPI, practice phone number, ZIP code, complete reCAPTCHA, provide your name, time zone, contact info, confirm your email, enter prescription identification info, and then input your practice's account details, address, and contact info, followed by accepting the terms of use, code of conduct, and privacy policy.

question: How can I rebook an appointment for a customer in Vagaro?
answer: You can rebook an appointment by selecting a previously checked-out appointment on the calendar or choosing rebook in the 'What do you want to do next?' popup when checking out a customer.

question: How do I sign up for a class using the Vagaro app?
answer: To sign up for a class in the Vagaro app, go to the business's listing page, select Classes, choose the desired class, adjust the schedule if needed, select Sign Up, configure your schedule and attendees, then proceed to checkout and complete your booking.

question: Can a location delete synced vendors or discounts?
answer: No, a location can edit synced vendors and discounts but cannot delete them.

question: How does the system decide which visit to deduct first when marking multiple appointments as no-shows?
answer: The system deducts a package visit first if there is a redeemable membership visit; otherwise, it deducts from the package closest to expiration or with the lowest visit balance if it doesn't expire.

question: How can I get my previous year's tax document if it hasn't appeared yet?
answer: If the form isn't visible, it means it hasn't been created yet; you need to update your details and save to generate it.

question: How does Vagaro indicate its HIPAA compliance on its website?
answer: Vagaro displays the HIPAA Seal of Compliance at the bottom of its Sales and Support web pages.

question: What is the starting price for Vagaro's premium feature that allows creating and managing a business website?
answer: The starting price for Vagaro's MySite feature, which allows creating and managing a business website, is $20/month.

question: How can I reuse a product detail template across multiple products in Vagaro?
answer: To reuse a product detail template across multiple products, turn on 'Save as a Detail Template' when creating or editing a detail, enter a Template Name, and save it. Then, when adding details to other products, select the existing template from the list to apply the same details.

question: What is the first step to creating a Vagaro business account according to the guide?
answer: The first step is entering your information, which includes selecting the services you offer and providing your credit card details for verification.

question: How can I customize the display that my clients see on the device used for payments and forms?
answer: You can personalize the appearance by choosing between Light or Dark Mode, adding your business logo, and selecting images of your business or Daily Deals to show on the screen.

question: How can I add a Scale element to my form in Vagaro?
answer: To add a Scale element, go to Forms, select your form or SOAP note, then drag the Scale element into the form designer from Form Elements.

question: How can I add a separator element to my form in Vagaro?
answer: To add a separator, go to Forms, select your form or SOAP note, then drag the Separator element into the form designer under Form Elements.

question: What permissions are needed for an employee to view and modify payroll settings and reports?
answer: Employees need View access to see payroll settings and reports, and Modify access to change payroll configuration settings, hourly pay, and commission structures.

question: Does creating or editing my Vagaro components in Vagaro automatically update my MySite?
answer: No, Vagaro components sync directly with your Vagaro business, so you don't need to update them in MySite. To make changes, you must edit the related settings in your Vagaro account.

question: What information can I include in the Appointment Notes section for a scheduled appointment?
answer: You can include any notes about special requirements, reminders, requests, or comments for the appointment, and attach relevant files, forms, or images.

question: How can a business owner collect a failed rent payment from an employee's profile on a computer or tablet?
answer: To collect a failed rent payment from an employee's profile on a computer or tablet, go to Settings → Employee Profiles, select the employee's profile, then click on Rent Collection. Find the payment with a Failed status, select the Action menu, then choose Collect Payment. Verify the Amount Due, select the payment method (cash, check, or credit card), and click Collect. Refresh the screen to see the payment marked as Paid.

question: What is required to enable the Book button on my Instagram business profile using Vagaro?
answer: You must have an Instagram business account and connect it to your Vagaro account by following the integration steps, including logging into Vagaro and authorizing the connection.

question: What happens to a membership if I cancel it after refunding it in Vagaro?
answer: If you cancel a membership after refunding it, the membership cannot be reactivated and must be repurchased if the customer wants to be a member again.

question: How do new staff members get started with the system after they're invited?
answer: They receive notifications via email, text, and push alert, guiding them to complete their account setup by confirming their details and creating a password.

question: What is the recommended process for creating a discount for cash payments in Vagaro?
answer: First, increase your prices across all services, classes, memberships, and products to cover processing fees. Then, on a computer or tablet, go to Settings → Discounts, create a new discount named 'Discount for Cash,' select all relevant items to group them, and enter a percentage discount equal to your price increase. Finally, apply this preset discount at checkout when a customer pays with cash.

question: How can I update a customer's email address on their profile using the Vagaro Pro App?
answer: Go to Customers, select the customer, tap Edit in the top-right corner, and then update the Email field with the new email address.

question: How can I temporarily stop customers from using a special offer without losing all the related data?
answer: You should deactivate the discount by toggling it off in the settings, which makes it unavailable without deleting it or losing its information.

question: How can I log into my Vagaro account using the Vagaro app on my mobile device?
answer: Open the Vagaro app, select Profile in the bottom-right corner, enter your Username or Email and Password, then select Login. If needed, you can also sign in with Facebook, Google, or Apple, and complete verification if prompted.

question: How can I temporarily remove someone from the upcoming payment cycle without firing them?
answer: You can exclude them from the current pay period using the payroll report, which will grey out their row and prevent their payment from being processed this cycle.

question: How can I include a customer's name in my lost customer text campaign message?
answer: You can select the 'Insert First Name' or 'Insert First & Last' option in the campaign builder to automatically include the customer's name in your message.

question: How can I pick a different date or time for a future session if I want to change my plans?
answer: You can select a new start date and choose from available class times based on your location or a different city if you prefer a different schedule.

question: How can I delete a payroll that has been marked as 'Paid' using the Vagaro Pro App?
answer: To delete a paid payroll using the Vagaro Pro App, go to More → Reports → Employees → Payroll History, select the payroll period in the Filters list, generate the report, then tap the Filters button at the top, and select Delete below the Payroll Period list. Confirm the deletion in the popup.

question: How can I require customers to have a membership before checking in at a Vagaro kiosk?
answer: To require customers to have a membership when checking in, go to the Check-In app's settings, select 'Membership Required to Check-In,' toggle it on, and optionally enter a message for inactive memberships. This will prompt customers that a membership is required and they must purchase or renew it at the kiosk before checking in.

question: How can I sign up for a Vagaro workshop through Vagaro University?
answer: To sign up for a Vagaro workshop, go to Vagaro University at mysite.vagaro.com/vagarouniversity, select 'Workshops' at the top of the screen, under 'Live/Upcoming' click 'Register Now' for your preferred workshop, choose the session, and then fill out the registration form to complete your sign-up.

question: How can I connect my Vagaro account with other tools to automate updates without manually entering data?
answer: You can use APIs and webhooks to programmatically link your Vagaro account with external systems, enabling real-time notifications and automated workflows.

question: What file formats are supported for uploading images to use with the Vagaro Markup Editor?
answer: The supported file formats are .jpg, .png, and .gif.

question: What must I do to restore a deleted employee's appointments in Vagaro?
answer: To restore a deleted employee's appointments, you need to contact support and pay a one-time restoration fee of $50.

question: If I decide to stop sharing customer details across my locations, will the customers who made purchases at multiple sites still be linked in the system?
answer: Yes, if a shared customer has made a purchase at another business in the group, their profile will remain linked even after customer sharing is turned off.

question: If I move my clients' details to a different account, will their information be erased from my current setup?
answer: No, when customer data is copied over, it remains in your original system while also being available in the new account.

question: How do I share customer profiles between locations in my multi-location Vagaro setup?
answer: Go to Settings → Business → Multi-Location, select the group to edit, toggle on Share Customers, choose the locations to sync from the Sync Customers from menu, select the customer information to sync, and then click Save.

question: How can I update my profile photo in the Vagaro app?
answer: In the Vagaro app, go to your Profile screen, select 'Choose a file,' then select a photo from your Camera or Files to add or update your profile photo.

question: How can I prevent new customers from booking online with my salon?
answer: To block new customers from booking online, go to Online Appointment Rules, then under the Booking heading, toggle on 'Block New Customers from Online Booking' and select the employees who will not accept new customer appointments, then save your changes.

question: How can I make sure my new staff member's bank account details are correct before I start paying them through direct deposit?
answer: Your employee will need to check their bank statement for two small transactions we send to verify ownership, and then you will enter those amounts into the system for confirmation.

question: What are the iPhone model and iOS version requirements to use Tap to Pay with Vagaro?
answer: Tap to Pay requires an iPhone XS or later running iOS 16.7 or later, with updating to the latest iOS version recommended for best performance.

question: How many Google Calendars can I sync with Vagaro at the same time?
answer: You can only link and sync one Google Calendar with Vagaro at a time.

question: Where will my Daily Deal be visible once it's approved?
answer: Once approved, the Daily Deal appears on the Vagaro Marketplace, your Vagaro Listing Page, and MySite.

question: How can I see how much each team member earned from sales over a certain period?
answer: You can run the Employee Sales report, select the desired date range, and view the details for each employee's sales, tips, taxes, and fees collected during that time.

question: How can I add a Date and Time element to my form in Vagaro?
answer: Go to Forms, create or edit a form, drag the Choose One element into the form designer, then set the Date Options to include Date, Time, Date and Time, or Date Range.

question: What should I do if I want to verify my bank account during the Plaid verification process but my bank is not supported?
answer: If your bank is not supported for deposits with Vagaro, you need to change the bank in your Merchant Account after setting up deposits with an unsupported bank.

question: How can I import my existing product list into Vagaro?
answer: You can import your existing product list into Vagaro by organizing it in an Excel file and emailing it to support@vagaro.com. If you have no products added yet, Vagaro also provides an example Excel file on the Inventory Management screen to assist with the import.

question: How can I change the layout of my popup to have the message appear horizontally or vertically?
answer: In your Pop-Up settings, next to Layout, you can choose between Horizontal and Vertical configurations, which will change how your message appears and whether the image is at the top or side.

question: Where can employees and contractors find their paystubs and tax forms in Vagaro Payroll?
answer: Employees and contractors can download their paystubs, tax forms, and other documents in their Employee Profile on the Payroll tab under the Documents heading.

question: What happens during the first sync of a flagship's settings to other locations?
answer: During the first sync, the flagship's settings override the same settings at all other locations, regardless of whether those settings are locked or unlocked.
